extension.description: v3.9.7: FULL FEATURES - Speed Optimizer, Scheduled Auto-Clean, RD/PM/AD/Trakt/TMDB Auth, IPTV Vault, Favourites Vault, USB Backup, Repair Tools, Cache and Package Cleaner.

Orion v3.2.5 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, and auto-play next episode.

extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - 45+ scrapers, Stremio, Trakt, Debrid
extension.description: SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 45+ scrapers including Stremio protocol (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Comet, CyberFlix, PeerFlix). Features concurrent scraping, Trakt scrobbling and watched tracking, Up Next, Skip Intro, 24/7 Channels, Debrid support (RD, PM, AD, TorBox), Trakt integration with TMDB posters. Free streams available without debrid. Thanks to Mister X and Zaxxon709.

extension.summary: Superpowered Trakt Player - Click and Play with Debrid, AI Vibes, Discovery Feed
extension.description: Trakt Player - Click any movie or episode and it plays instantly via Debrid. Features: Click-and-Play, AI Vibes, Discovery Feed, Trakt Scrobbling, Up Next, Recommendations, Calendar, Friends, Stats, Custom Lists, Premiumize/RD/AD. Created by zeus768.

extension.summary: Genesis - Stream Movies and TV Shows with Debrid, Trakt, TMDB, CocoScrapers, Gears
extension.description: Genesis v9.4.0 - Movies and TV Shows powered by Trakt API browsing and TMDB metadata (posters, cast, directors). Debrid support (Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox), Trakt.tv integration, CocoScrapers and Gears Scrapers external providers, plus built-in torrent and streaming scrapers. Kodi 21+ Python 3 compatible.
extension.disclaimer: The author does not host or distribute any of the content displayed by this addon.

extension.description: Themes and media resources for Genesis addon. Compatible with Kodi 21 Omega and above.

extension.summary: Premium Xtream Codes IPTV Player with Poseidon Guide EPG Grid
extension.description: Poseidon Player - Premium IPTV experience with EPG Grid, TV Guide, Live TV, Movies (VOD), TV Series, Favorites, Search, Recently Watched, Catch-up TV, Reminders, and IPTV Manager Integration. Powered by Xtream Codes API.
extension.disclaimer: Poseidon Player does not provide any content. You must provide your own Xtream Codes credentials.

extension.summary: EPG Grid Guide for Poseidon Player
extension.description: Poseidon Guide - Full EPG grid view for Poseidon Player with channel numbers, icons and names.

Zeus768's Kodi Addon Repository.
Available Addons: - Genesis - Stream Movies and TV Shows - SALTS (Stream All The Sources) - 35+ scrapers, Debrid, Trakt - Trakt Player - Click and Play, Debrid-powered - Orion - Media Explorer with Torrent Scrapers - Poseidon Player - Premium IPTV Player with EPG - Poseidon Guide - EPG Grid for Poseidon Player - The Accountant - Kodi Maintenance Suite - Genesis Themepak - Themes for Genesis - ResolveURL - URL Resolver Module
